description: Service not covered under member's plan.
Annual benefit maximum reached for this service category.
Required medical records not submitted within the 45-day window.
Missing or invalid diagnosis code on claim submission.
Provider not in-network for member's plan.
Out-of-network referral not obtained prior to service.
Prior authorization not obtained before service was rendered.
Authorization expired before date of service.
Other primary insurance coverage indicated; coordinate with primary payer.
Primary payer Explanation of Benefits required to process this claim.
